pkgmetadata.longdescription: Serena is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) toolkit for coding agents. It provides semantic code retrieval, editing, refactoring, and debugging tools at the symbol level — acting as the IDE for your coding agent. Features include cross-file renames, reference lookups, type hierarchy queries, and integration with any MCP-enabled AI client.

use.flag: Enable the native GUI dashboard viewer (pywebview + pystray). Unsupported on Linux; use the browser-based fallback instead.
